ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the donor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the donor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the donor */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the donor */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Whether the donor has given consent for their samples to be used for research purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor from whom the sample was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of sample collection relative to a treatment or condition */,
  "subpopulation" TEXT /* Subpopulation of cells in the sample (e.g., PBMC, CD4+, CD8+) */,
  "number_of_cells" TEXT /* Approximate number of cells in the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sample */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the physical sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_subpopulation FOREIGN KEY ("subpopulation") REFERENCES subpopulations ("subpop_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_day FOREIGN KEY ("day") REFERENCES measurement_days ("day_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample the metrics belong to */,
  "UMIs" INTEGER /* Number of unique molecular identifiers in the sample */,
  "unique_clonotypes" INTEGER /* Number of unique clonotypes detected in the sample */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Type of TCR chain (e.g., TCRalpha, TCRbeta) */,
  "clonotype_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of clonotypes in the sample */,
  "clonotype_diversity" REAL /* Diversity of clonotypes in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_metrics_chain FOREIGN KEY ("chain") REFERENCES chains ("chain_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing entry */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was processed */,
  "processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who processed the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_processing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_processing_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample being sequenced */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the sequencing run was performed */,
  "run_method" TEXT /* Method used for the sequencing run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the sequencing run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software entry */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., diversity, frequency) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "software_used" INTEGER /* Software used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_software_used FOREIGN KEY ("software_used") REFERENCES analysis_software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data manager, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement day */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* Day number for the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement conditions or significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subpopulations" (
  "subpop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subpopulation type */,
  "subpop_name" TEXT /* Name of the subpopulation (e.g., PBMC, CD4+, CD8+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subpopulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subpop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCR chain type */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the TCR chain (e.g., TCRalpha, TCRbeta) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TCR chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)
